title: Strava | Running, Cycling & Hiking App
claims_supported: Strava positions itself around activity tracking, maps, performance data, and community sharing.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Recording an Activity - Strava Support
claims_supported: Mobile recording includes activity capture, save/discard choices, activity details, privacy controls, and Beacon entry points.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Activity Privacy Controls - Strava Support
claims_supported: Activities can use Everyone, Followers, or Only You visibility, with default and per-activity changes.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Creating Routes on Mobile - Strava Support
claims_supported: The mobile Maps tab and Create Route flow support route planning by sport type and map interaction.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Segment Leaderboard Guidelines - Strava Support
claims_supported: Segments use matched GPS efforts and leaderboards separated by activity type.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Strava Challenges - Strava Support
claims_supported: Challenges motivate activity through distance, elevation, time, segment, and frequency goals.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Strava: Run, Bike, Walk - App Store
claims_supported: The listing describes GPS tracking, activity sharing, segments, route planning, and challenges.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Strava: Run, Bike, Walk - Google Play
claims_supported: The listing presents Strava as a multi-sport tracking and fitness community app.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Nike Run Club App
claims_supported: Nike Run Club is a running app with guided runs, training plans, challenges, run tracking, and community motivation.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Nike Run Club: Running Coach - App Store
claims_supported: The listing describes Guided Runs, Training Plans, Apple Watch support, challenges, achievements, and safety features.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Nike Run Club - Running Coach - Google Play
claims_supported: The listing describes GPS run tracking, Audio-Guided Runs, Training Plans, challenges, and coaching.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Running Training Plans. Nike.com
claims_supported: Nike training plans include guided runs, mindset advice, recovery tips, and goal-oriented running schedules.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Does the NRC App Have Training Plans? | Nike Help
claims_supported: Nike states the app features training plans created by NRC coaches for all levels of runners.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: How Do I Get Started in the NRC App? | Nike Help
claims_supported: The Run tab supports basic runs, distance or time targets, speed runs, and Guided Runs.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: Nike Run Club App Delivers New Features
claims_supported: Nike describes localized run tips, real-time location sharing with friends and family, six training plans, and about 300 audio guided runs.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.

title: How the Nike Run Club App Can Help You Reach Your Running Goals
claims_supported: Nike describes pace, location, distance, elevation, heart rate, mile splits, progress history, and wearable pairing.
notes: Official source; accessed for PA1 evidence refresh.
